sentence_reviews.text: Task decomposition breaks a broad objective into ordered or partially ordered subgoals whose outputs, dependencies, and stopping conditions can be managed explicitly.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Graph search, BFS/DFS & A*.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
